prompt: Soil water store with rainfall input and evapotranspiration loss

args.description: Soil water store with rainfall input and evapotranspiration loss

stages.name: ID Normalization
stages.note: Mapped LLM strings to valid UUIDs

result.note: Pass bondGraph to validate_model and run_simulation

stages.name: BG semantic check
stages.note: State variables present, no orphans, junctions connected

pipeline.name: generate_diagram
pipeline.result:
### BDD — Block Definition Diagram
```mermaid
classDiagram
  class hydraulicdomain {
    <<ItemDefinition>>
    +domain: hydraulic
  }
  class rainfallinput {
    <<PartUsage>>
    +bgType: Sf
    +parameter: 0.05
  }
  class soilwaterstore {
    <<PartUsage>>
    +bgType: C
    +parameter: 1000
  }
  class evapotranspirationloss {
    <<PartUsage>>
    +bgType: R
    +parameter: 50
  }
  class soilnode {
    <<PartUsage>>
    +bgType: J0
  }
```

---

### IBD — Internal Block Diagram
```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
graph LR
  %% IBD: SoilWaterSystem
  rainfallinput["Sf: RainfallInput"]
  soilwaterstore["C: SoilWaterStore"]
  evapotranspirationloss["R: EvapotranspirationLoss"]
  soilnode["J0: SoilNode"]
  rainfallinput -->|RainToNode| soilnode
  soilnode -->|NodeToStorage| soilwaterstore
  soilnode -->|NodeToLoss| evapotranspirationloss
```

---

### PAR — Parametric Diagram
```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
graph TD
  title["<<Parametric Diagram>>"]
  rainfallinput["{Sf: RainfallInput\nparam=0.05}"]
  soilwaterstore["{C: SoilWaterStore\nparam=1000}"]
  evapotranspirationloss["{R: EvapotranspirationLoss\nparam=50}"]
  soilnode["J0: SoilNode"]
  rainfallinput --> soilnode
  soilnode --> soilwaterstore
  soilnode --> evapotranspirationloss
```

---

### PKG — Package Diagram
```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
graph TD
  pkg["<<Package>>\nSoilWaterSystem"]
  pkg --> pu_rainfallinput["<<PartUsage>>\nRainfallInput\n[Sf]"]
  pkg --> pu_soilwaterstore["<<PartUsage>>\nSoilWaterStore\n[C]"]
  pkg --> pu_evapotranspirationloss["<<PartUsage>>\nEvapotranspirationLoss\n[R]"]
  pkg --> pu_soilnode["<<PartUsage>>\nSoilNode\n[J0]"]
  pkg --> id_hydraulicdomain["<<ItemDefinition>>\nHydraulicDomain"]
```

---

### SEQ — Sequence Diagram
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  %% SoilWaterSystem
  participant rainfallinput as Sf:RainfallInput
  participant soilwaterstore as C:SoilWaterStore
  participant evapotranspirationloss as R:EvapotranspirationLoss
  participant soilnode as J0:SoilNode
  rainfallinput->>soilnode: RainToNode
  soilnode->>soilwaterstore: NodeToStorage
  soilnode->>evapotranspirationloss: NodeToLoss
```

---

### ACT — Activity Diagram
```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
graph TD
  rainfallinput(["▶ Sf: RainfallInput"])
  soilwaterstore["C: SoilWaterStore\nq=1000"]
  evapotranspirationloss{{"R: EvapotranspirationLoss"}}
  soilnode((J0))
  rainfallinput --> soilnode
  soilnode --> soilwaterstore
  soilnode --> evapotranspirationloss
```

---

### UC — Use Case Diagram
```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
graph LR
  title["<<UseCase>>\nSoilWaterSystem"]
  actor_rainfallinput["<<actor>>\nRainfallInput"]
  uc_soilwaterstore(("C: SoilWaterStore"))
  uc_evapotranspirationloss(("R: EvapotranspirationLoss"))
  uc_soilnode(("J0: SoilNode"))
  actor_rainfallinput --> uc_soilnode
  uc_soilnode --> uc_soilwaterstore
  uc_soilnode --> uc_evapotranspirationloss
```

---

### STM — State Machine Diagram
```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
  state "SoilWaterStore\n(C: q=1000)" as soilwaterstore
```

---

### REQ — Requirement Diagram
```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
graph TD
  req0["<<RequirementDiagram>>\nSystem: SoilWaterSystem"]
  req1["<<requirement>>\nID: 1\nname: RainfallInput shall model Sf element"]
  req0 --> req1
  req2["<<requirement>>\nID: 2\nname: SoilWaterStore shall model C element"]
  req0 --> req2
  req3["<<requirement>>\nID: 3\nname: EvapotranspirationLoss shall model R element"]
  req0 --> req3
  req4["<<requirement>>\nID: 4\nname: SoilNode shall model J0 element"]
  req0 --> req4
```

---

### ESL — Odum Energy Systems Language (reconstructed)
```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
graph LR
  src_rainfallinput(("☀ RainfallInput"))
  stg_soilwaterstore[["⬡ SoilWaterStore\nq=1000"]]
  snk_evapotranspirationloss{{"↓ EvapotranspirationLoss"}}
  jn_soilnode((J0))
  src_rainfallinput --> jn_soilnode
  jn_soilnode --> stg_soilwaterstore
  jn_soilnode --> snk_evapotranspirationloss
```

---

### BG — Bond Graph Topology (reconstructed)
```mermaid
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
graph LR
  n1(["Sf: RainfallInput (0.05)"])
  n2[["C: SoilWaterStore (1000)"]]
  n3["R: EvapotranspirationLoss (50)"]
  n4((J0))
  n1 --> n4
  n4 --> n2
  n4 --> n3
```

result.error: Emergy analysis is currently only supported for Odum ESL models.
result.note: The current model is a Bond Graph. You can convert it to Odum ESL or use the Bond Graph solver for power/energy analysis.

reply: This bond graph model captures the hydraulic dynamics of soil moisture, representing the storage of potential energy and fluid mass balance within the soil matrix. Simulation reveals the system's characteristic time constant for moisture depletion and identifies the steady-state water volume where precipitation influx balances evapotranspiration losses.
